summary: Session 3 fixes regression — all 10/10 backend pytest pass and all 8 frontend flows pass. Backend: short password (6 chars) on POST /api/super-admin/admins → 422 with 'password' in message; valid 8+ char password → 201 with email echoed (no password leakage); SA POST /api/admin/profiles?on_behalf_of=<demo_ph_id> creates the profile under the photographer (verified by listing as photographer); photographer trying on_behalf_of of another id is silently downgraded to own admin_id (no privilege escalation); SA on_behalf_of=fake-id → 404 Photographer not found; GET /api/admin/profiles (photographer token) returns the Aarav & Riya demo (slug=aarav-and-riya-demo, groom=Aarav, bride=Riya); SA detail returns summary.rsvps_total=5, summary.views_total=142, and demo profile metrics views=142/rsvps=5/wishes=5/photos=6; /api/public/gallery/<slug>/photos returns exactly 6 photos; /api/invite/<slug> returns groom=Aarav, bride=Riya, venue contains 'Leela'; Cache-Control header at the FastAPI layer = 'public, max-age=30, s-maxage=60'. Frontend: SA /super-admin/login → /super-admin/dashboard (no redirect-loop on reload — authLoading guard works); action bar shows create-admin-btn + sa-create-invitation-btn + credit-packs-btn; CreateAdminModal opens with all 4 fields and password minLength=8; submitting Goodpass1 closes the modal and new row appears in admins-list; sa-create-invitation-btn navigates to /admin/profile/new?as=super-admin; /super-admin/photographers/<id> renders Demo Photographer header + pd-create-invitation button + views=142 tile + Aarav&Riya card; clicking pd-create-invitation navigates to /admin/profile/new?on_behalf_of=<id> AND the gold on-behalf-banner is rendered ('Creating invitation on behalf of a photographer'); public /invite/<slug> loads the luxury wax-seal monogram with 'R & A' (no errors, no crash).

minor.issue: ProfileResponse does not expose admin_id — clients/tests cannot directly verify ownership after creation. Workaround: verify via /api/admin/profiles list under the target photographer's token. Consider adding admin_id to ProfileResponse (or returning it only for super_admin callers) for clearer API contract.

summary.profiles_total counts ALL profiles including drafts; spec hint says '1' but seeded photographer also accumulated test-created drafts during this run (TEST_ prefixed). Demo metrics (views=142, rsvps=5, wishes=5, photos=6 on the Aarav&Riya card) are still correct because they're per-profile.

action_items: (Test hygiene) The test suite left a few TEST_ prefixed profiles on the demo photographer because DELETE /api/admin/profiles/<id> isn't called in cleanup (status unknown — may not exist). If a cleanup endpoint exists, wire it into the test teardown so future SA detail counts remain pristine.
(API contract) Consider adding admin_id to ProfileResponse for super_admin role so on_behalf_of correctness can be asserted directly without a second list call.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:1015-1032 — on_behalf_of impersonation check is correctly gated by admin_data.get('role') == 'super_admin'; photographer tokens are silently downgraded to own admin_id (good — prevents privilege escalation while staying non-breaking).
server.py:1029 — find_one query correctly filters {'id': on_behalf_of, 'role': 'admin'} so a super_admin can't accidentally hand off to another super_admin or a deleted admin.
LuxurySuperAdminDashboard.jsx — authLoading guard prevents the AuthContext race that previously redirected to /super-admin/login on hard reload. Verified by browser reload test.
Password validation surfaces a 422 with field-level detail — UI can map it to a friendly error. Confirmed via direct API call with password='short'.
Cache-Control header is set at the FastAPI middleware layer for /api/invite/* — verified at localhost:8001 (public preview URL still has CDN override risk; previously documented in iteration_8).
test_credentials: Super admin: superadmin@wedding.com / SuperAdmin@123 ; Photographer: admin@wedding.com / admin123 ; Demo photographer id: 604db096-c1ca-4738-8663-7e640334a6ac ; Demo invitation slug: aarav-and-riya-demo. UA header 'Mozilla/5.0' required on /api/admin/* and /api/super-admin/* — bot-detection middleware blocks python-requests default UA.
seed_data_creation: Test created 1 photographer admin (TEST_ok_<rand>@example.com, password Goodpass1) and 2 profiles via on_behalf_of flow. Photographer admin was deleted via DELETE /api/super-admin/admins/<id>. Profile cleanup (DELETE /api/admin/profiles/<id>) was attempted but endpoint may not exist — minor residue of TEST_ profiles on the demo photographer (visible in SA detail tab Invitations(5)). Demo invitation aarav-and-riya-demo is intact and NOT modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Use POST /api/admin/profiles with REQUIRED fields: groom_name, bride_name, venue, event_date, event_type (string e.g. 'wedding'), events (can be []). Missing event_type → 422. 2) ProfileResponse does NOT include admin_id — to verify on_behalf_of correctness, login as the target photographer and list /api/admin/profiles, check the new id is there. 3) authLoading guard added to LuxurySuperAdminDashboard, LuxuryDashboard, LuxuryProfileForm — hard reload tests work now without redirect-loop. 4) The on-behalf-banner is implemented and rendered when ?on_behalf_of=<id> is present in the URL on /admin/profile/new (super_admin role only). 5) Demo data: views=142, rsvps=5, wishes=5, photos=6, slug='aarav-and-riya-demo' — DO NOT delete or modify. 6) iteration_9.json now corresponds to this run (previous numbering 1-8 already used).
